examples:
Command Example
symantec-mc-get-policy uuid="0D264052-9628-4872-8C07-E04A8B95F602"
Context Example
{
"SymantecMC.Policy": {
"ReferenceID": "test_ip_list",
"ContentType": "IP_LIST",
"Description": "New description",
name: symantec-mc-get-policy

outputs.description: Policy name. SymantecMC.Policy.SchemaVersion Policy content schema version.
outputs.name: SymantecMC.Policy.Name

outputs.description: Policy content revision number. SymantecMC.Policy.RevisionInfo.Description Policy content revision description.
outputs.name: SymantecMC.Policy.RevisionInfo.Number

outputs.description: Policy content revision author. SymantecMC.Policy.RevisionInfo.Date Date
outputs.name: SymantecMC.Policy.RevisionInfo.Author

outputs.description: Policy IP description. SymantecMC.Policy.IP.Enabled Policy IP enabled.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Policy URL address. SymantecMC.Policy.URL.Description Policy URL description.
outputs.name: SymantecMC.Policy.URL.Address

outputs.description: Policy URL enabled. SymantecMC.Policy.Category.Name Policy category name.
outputs.name: SymantecMC.Policy.URL.Enabled
